positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a wise old owl perched on a crescent moon branch. The owl has oversized, detailed, geometric eyes and is surrounded by abstract cosmic elements like nebula swirls, glowing constellations, and falling crystalline dust. Use a deep indigo and sapphire color palette accented with gold foil lettering/details, creating a high-contrast silhouette effect. The composition must be perfectly centered, making the owl the clear focal point, suitable for repeating pattern or single chest print. Studio lighting, vector art quality, clean line work, dramatic contrast, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, logo, copyright, noise
